original_statement: how many tournaments are listed in the table?
mutated_statement: how many things are implied in the content?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Context/location change + Modality shift: Specific noun "tournaments" generalized to vague "things" (tournaments→things) | Context changed from explicit listing in a table to inferred items in broader content (listed in the table→implied in the content)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见，评判明确写道“表格在‘no.’ 列中从1到10编号，表明内容中暗示有10条目”。agent 的执行链中 simple_query 返回“10”，并在 thought 中直接说明“表列出10条目”，未提及问题从“tournaments”到“things”的泛化或上下文变化，也未提出澄清或不确定性。agent 整体表现为直接按照自己的理解处理问题并给出确定答案，未意识到或标注原指令存在模糊性或歧义，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
